title: Calibration
description: First steps in the steampunk world. Everything is on time.

steps.text: The air ticks. Somewhere beneath the street, something enormous keeps the beat.

lines.speaker: Mage
lines.text: The mana here is under PRESSURE. Someone plumbed it.

lines.speaker: Rogue
lines.text: Four clocks on this street. All agreeing. That's not trust, that's enforcement.

lines.speaker: Fighter
lines.text: The train arrived as we did. Exactly as we did.

lines.speaker: Cleric
lines.text: Is it blasphemy to say the schedule feels like a god here?

lines.speaker: Bard
lines.text: It has a tempo. Gods usually do. This one's in 4/4 and I don't fully approve.
